name: manage_applications
description: List, create, or update Balena applications (also called fleets). An application groups devices that run the same containers. You can view application details, create new ones, or update settings like the target release.

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: OData filter expression, e.g. filter by app name or organization.

parameters.name: $select
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return.
